name: Kicharee with Tomato and Tamarind Salsa (Hl)
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons toasted and ground coriander seeds
1 cup basmati rice or brown rice, cooked
4 leaves of napa cabbage leaves, blanched
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté the coriander, cumin seeds, and turmeric with about one tablespoon of ghee until the aroma rises.
2. Stir in the pre-cooked mung beans. Adjust the thickness by using residual cooking liquid if desired.
3. Add the cooked basmati rice or brown rice with a pinch of salt. Mix well in a bowl.
4. Spoon approximately 2-3 tablespoons of the mixture into the center of each cabbage leaf.
5. Fold the bottom of the leaf into the center, then fold each side, and finally fold down to form a pouch.
6. Steam the kicharee rolls for about 3-4 minutes if fresh, or 6 minutes if made in advance and refrigerated.
7. Serve with Tomato and Tamarind Salsa.
Yield: 2 servings
